interaction_phrase: the Federal Government's goal is to move Germany
occurrence_sentence: Against this backdrop the Federal Government's goal is to move Germany and Europe into a leading international position in quantum technologies through targeted, long-term support and then to further consolidate this position.

interaction_phrase: an advantage for the emerging quantum industry in Germany
occurrence_sentence: The Federal Government will therefore build a quality infrastructure for quantum technologies that creates an advantage for the emerging quantum industry in Germany through objective, independent characterisation, qualification and standardisation of quantum technology components and comparative benchmarks for quantum computers, independent of the architecture.

interaction_phrase: Germany, together with partners from the European Union
occurrence_sentence: This would mean that Germany, together with partners from the European Union, becomes technological­ly independent when it comes to the production of corresponding hardware and software.

interaction_phrase: quantum computers are also being procured for locations of the Gauss Centre
occurrence_sentence: In the European partnership EuroHPC, which is co-financed by the Federal Government, quantum computers are also being procured for locations of the Gauss Centre for Supercomputing in Germany; albeit with a smaller financial volume.

interaction_phrase: attain the same level as important non-European industrialised countries such as the
occurrence_sentence: Measurable technological goals in 2026 include: ∙Furthermore, the techno-economic development of the entrepreneurial ecosystem for quantum computing in Germany should be among the top three within the EU and as a minimum, should, together with its European partners, attain the same level as important non-European industrialised countries such as the USA or Japan.

interaction_phrase: to achieve the establishment of a quality infrastructure for quantum technologies for
occurrence_sentence: In order to establish 'made in Germany' quantum technologies as a global mark of quality, the Federal Government is aiming, by 2026, to achieve the establishment of a quality infrastructure for quantum technologies for objective, independent characterisation, qualification and standardisation of quantum technology components and comparative benchmarks.

source_actor: Bundesamt für Sicherheit in der Informationstechnik (BSI)
interaction_phrase: participates in the standardisation of the quantum-safe FrodoKEM and Classic McEliece procedures
occurrence_sentence: The BSI participates in the standardisation of the quantum-safe FrodoKEM and Classic McEliece procedures as recommended by it at ISO/IEC.
source_actor_key: bundesamt f r sicherheit in der informationstechnik

source_actor: Bundesamt für Sicherheit in der Informationstechnik (BSI)
interaction_phrase: a Preliminary Work Item for the Inclusion of key encapsulation mechanisms for
occurrence_sentence: In October 2022, a Preliminary Work Item for the Inclusion of key encapsulation mechanisms for PQC in ISO/IEC standards project was launched in ISO/IEC SC27 WG2 following a proposal from BSI.
source_actor_key: bundesamt f r sicherheit in der informationstechnik

occurrence_sentence: Over the course of its formative and strategic trading in the European Research Area, the DFG participates in the ERA-Net QuantERA.

interaction_phrase: responsible for funding participation from Germany
occurrence_sentence: In the last call for proposals, the DFG was responsible for funding participation from Germany in fundamental science-oriented projects.

interaction_phrase: has been an IBM Quantum Hub
occurrence_sentence: The FI CODE has been an IBM Quantum Hub between 2018 and 2023 and is therefore one of very few to gain exclusive access to the IBM quantum computer infrastructure worldwide.

source_actor: Fraunhofer-Gesellschaft zur Förderung der angewandten Forschung e. V. (Fraunhofer Society for the Promotion of Applied Research)
occurrence_sentence: The Fraunhofer-Gesellschaft supports the development of technologies in the field of quantum computing, in particular by setting up a nationwide competence network for quantum computing and within the framework of its cooperation with IBM Deutschland GmbH.
source_actor_key: fraunhofer gesellschaft zur f rderung der angewandten forschung e v

interaction_phrase: extend the cooperation with IBM as IBM Q Hub
occurrence_sentence: FI CODE intends to extend the cooperation with IBM as IBM Q Hub beyond 2023.

interaction_phrase: PTB is a founding member of Quantum Valley Lower Saxony (QVLS)
occurrence_sentence: PTB is a founding member of Quantum Valley Lower Saxony (QVLS).

interaction_phrase: PTB operates a QT high-tech incubator
occurrence_sentence: Together with QVLS partners, PTB operates a QT high-tech incubator.

interaction_phrase: PTB coordinates the BMBF-funded Quantum Communication Germany umbrella project
occurrence_sentence: PTB coordinates the BMBF-funded Quantum Communication Germany umbrella project in close cooperation with the BSI.
